verses.text: Tu-in Kish' tapa Saul' hangin a ut utin David a tat theihloh laitakin Ziklag-a ama kiangah mite hong pai-in amah pawlpih uh hi. Galsungah amah a huh a thahatte lakah amaute a kihelte ahi uh hi
Amaute pen thal tawite hi uh a, taklam khut tawh ahi a, veilam khut tawh ahi zongin thaltang leh suangte lawn thei uh hi. Amaute pen Saul' behte Benjamin mi ahi uh hi
Ahiezer a ukpi hi a, tua ciangin Joash ahi hi. Amaute gel pen Gibeah khuami Shemaah' tapate ahi uh hi. Amau gel nuai-ah galkapte: Azmaveth' tapate Jeziel leh Pelet; Anathoth khuami Berakah leh Jehu
Gibeon khuami Ishmaiah, mihing sawmthumte lakah a thahatpa leh sawmthumte a makaipa; Gederah khuami Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johanan, leh Jozabad
Harif mi Eluzai, Jerimoth, Bealiah, Shemariah, leh Shefatiah
Korah mi Elkanah, Isshiah, Azarel, Joezer, leh Jashobeam
Gedor khuami Jeroham' tapate Joelah leh Zebadiah ahi uh hi
Gad minam sung panin gamlaka munmuan'huai-a David kiangah a thahat a siam galhangte, lum leh tei zat a siam, a maitang uh humpinelkai maitang bangin, mualtunga om sakhi bangin a manlang mi hong paite
A ukpi Ezer, a nihna Obadiah, a thumna Eliab
a lina Mishmannah, a ngana Jeremiah
a gukna Attai, a sagihna Eliel
a giatna Johanan, a kuana Elzabad
a sawmna Jeremiah, a sawmlekhatna Makbannai ahi uh hi
Hih Gad mite pen galkap uliante hi a, a neuzawte in za khat val, a golzawte in tul khat val uk uh hi
Hihte pen Jordan a piau khempeuh a dimlet laitak kha masa sungin Jordan kantanin kuam sunga om mite nisuahna lam leh nitumna lamah a taisak mite ahi uh hi
Tua ciangin Benjamin mi leh Judah mi pawlkhat David kiang munmuan'huai-ah hong pai uh hi

Amaute a dawntuah dingin David paikhia-in amaute kiangah, “Kei kiangah kilawmtatna tawh keimah a huh dingin hong pai na hih uh leh note tawh ka lungsim kihual khawm ding hi. Ahih hangin keimah in bangmah khialhna neilo napi-in ka langte tungah kei a hong lehhek dingin a hong pai na hih uh leh, i pu i pate' Pasian in thei hen la, note hong tai ta hen,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin mihing sawmthum a ukpipa Amasai' tungah Pasian' kha hong tungin amah in, “David aw, kote, nangma-a' hi ung! Jessi' tapa aw, nangma pawl hi ung! Nangma tungah nopna hong om hen la, nang hong huhte tungah zong nopna hong om ta hen! Bang hang hiam cih leh na Pasian in nang hong huh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin David in amaute sang a, ama galkap uliante-in a bawl hi

Saul a do dingin Filistia mite tawh David a kuan laitakin Manasseh mi pawlkhat tai-in David a beel hi. (Ahi zongin David in Filistia mite huh theilo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Filistia mi a ukte in thu kikupna khat nei uh a, “Eite' makaite' siatna dingin a topa Saul kiangah David tai ding hi,” ci-in amah sawlkhia uh hi
Ziklag-ah amah a pai laitakin Manasseh sung panin tai-in amah a beelte: Adnah, Jozabad, Jediael, Mikhael, Jozabad, Elihu, leh Zillethai hi a, Manasseh sungah mi a tulin a ukte ahi uh hi
Amaute in mi' na a sut thei mite panin David huh uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a thahat a vanglian mi hi a, galkap sungah a ukte ahi uh hi
Pasian' galkap hon bangin galkap hon tampi a phak dongin a ni ni-in David a huh dingin mi hong paipai hi.
Hihte pen Topa' thugen bangin Saul kumpipa' gam David tungah a hei dingin Hebron-a ama kiangah a pai galkap a khen phazah ahi uh hi
Judah mi: Lum leh tei a pua galkap tul guk leh za giat ahi hi
Simeon mi: Galdo dingin a thahat a vanglian mihing tul sagih leh za khat ahi hi
Levi mi: Tul li leh za guk ahi hi
Aaron' suante sung pan ulian Jehoiada, leh amah tawh mi tul thum leh za sagih ahi hi
A thahat a vanglian a khangno Zadok, leh ama beh sung panin galkap a ukte mi sawmnih leh nih ahi hi
Benjamin mi: Tua hun ciangdong mi a tamzaw Saul tawh a kipawl, Saul' behte ahi Benjamin mite sung panin mihing tul thum ahi hi
Efraim mi: Amaute sung panin a thahat, a vanglian, amau' beh sungah a minthang mi tul sawmnih leh za giat ahi hi
Manasseh minam alangte: Amau sung panin hong pai-in David kumpi-in a bawl dingin a min a kilo mihing tul sawm leh tul giat ahi hi
Issakhar mi: Amaute sung panin Israel in bang a sep dingin kilawm cih a thei, hun paizia a thei ukpi za nih leh amau' ukna nuai-ah a om amau' behte khempeuh ahi uh hi
Zebulun mite: Amaute sung panin David a huh dingin lungsim a kikhat, hun khempeuhah gal a kap thei, galdona dingin galhiam khempeuh a nei mihing tul sawmnga ahi hi
Naftali mi: Amaute sung panin galkap a ukte tul khat leh amau tawh a om lum leh tei a tawi mihing tul sawmthum leh tul sagih ahi hi
Dan mi: Amaute sung panin galdo dingin a kithawi mihing tul sawmnih leh tul giat leh za guk ahi hi
Asher mi: Amaute sung panin galdo dingin a baihsa-in a om hun khempeuhah gal a kap thei mihing tul sawmli ahi hi
Jordan gal khata om Reuben mite leh Gad mite leh Manasseh minam alangte sung panin galhiam nam khempeuh tawh a kithawi mihing tul za khat leh tul sawmnih ahi hi

Galkap mi ahi, galsim dingin a kithawi hih mite khempeuh, Israel tungah David kumpi-in koih ding ngaihsutna takpi tawh Hebron-ah hong pai uh hi. Tua mah bangin Israel a omlaite khempeuh zong David kumpi-in a bawl ding uh a ngaihsutna uh kikhat hi
A sanggamte un amaute-a' dingin na vaihawmkhol uh ahih manin amaute tua lai-ah David tawh ni thum sung an ne tui dawnin omkhawm uh hi

Israel gamsungah lungdamna om ahih manin a vengte uh Issakhar leh Zebulun leh Naftali ciangdong panin zong hong pai-in late leh kalaohte leh la-sakolte leh bawngtalte tawh an hong pua-in, an tampi tak, theimohte, leenggahkeu bawkte, leh leenggahzu leh sathau, bawngtalte leh tuute, lungdam lahna-in hong puak uh hi.
